description: Evals for S8 dv-scoreboard: scoreboard implementation, ref model, functional coverage, CHK_ID reporting, SVA deduplication

test_cases.name: APB-UART: full scoreboard + ref model from testplan + S5/S7 data
test_cases.description: 4 testplan rows (2 Procedural, 1 Both, 1 Assertion-only). 1 SVA row skipped. Tests: analysis_imp per VIP, RAL mirror check, data compare task, ref model analysis port wiring, coverage model, CHK_ID in report_phase.

testplan_rows.testcase_description:
DUT Config: default
Stimulus: APB write UART_CTRL
Checks: UART_CTRL readback
Pass Criteria: readback == written value

DUT Config: UART_CTRL.TX_EN=1
Stimulus: send 0xA5
Checks: TXD byte matches
Pass Criteria: received == sent

DUT Config: default
Stimulus: 10 consecutive TX
Checks: STATUS.TX_FULL never asserts
Pass Criteria: TX_FULL == 0 throughout

assertions.description: CHK_UART_APB_PROTOCOL_001 skipped (it is Assertion type in dv_assertions_data.json)
assertions.check: apb_uart_scoreboard.sv does NOT contain CHK_UART_APB_PROTOCOL_001 as a check task

assertions.description: analysis_imp_decl macros and handles for apb_vip and uart_vip plus expected
assertions.check: scoreboard.sv contains uvm_analysis_imp_decl(_apb_vip) AND uvm_analysis_imp_decl(_uart_vip) AND uvm_analysis_imp_decl(_expected)

assertions.description: write_apb_vip() performs RAL mirror comparison for reads
assertions.check: write_apb_vip contains ral.default_map.get_reg_by_offset AND get_mirrored_value AND _chk_reg_read

assertions.description: Check tasks generated for Procedural/Both rows
assertions.check: _chk_chk_uart_reg_ctrl_write_001 task exists AND _chk_chk_uart_tx_data_integrity_001 task exists AND _chk_chk_uart_tx_fifo_001 task exists

assertions.description: m_cov_ap sends sb_transaction on every passing check

assertions.check: scoreboard.sv contains Scoreboard Report AND m_pass_cnt AND m_fail_cnt AND [PASS] All scoreboard checks

assertions.description: Reference model has analysis_imp for uart_vip (stimulus) and m_sb_ap to scoreboard
assertions.check: ref_model.sv contains uvm_analysis_imp AND uart_vip_seq_item AND m_sb_ap

assertions.description: predict() function has RAL read stubs and NEEDS_ENGINEER_REVIEW tag
Functional coverage model is uvm_subscriber of sb_transaction with covergroups per feature
assertions.check: functional_coverage.sv contains extends uvm_subscriber AND sb_transaction AND cg_apb_register AND cg_uart_tx

assertions.description: dv_scoreboard_data.json has correct check count and skipped SVA count

test_cases.name: S8 asks design analysis questions before generating code
test_cases.description: When dv_tb_data.json is available but no S7 data and no answers given, S8 must run design analysis, print analysis summary, and ask all Q1-Q9 in ONE message before writing any file.

assertions.description: Skill prints design analysis summary before asking questions
assertions.check: output contains 'Data flows detected' AND 'Reference model assessment'

assertions.description: All 9 design questions presented in ONE message with Q1-Q9 labels
assertions.check: output contains [Q1] AND [Q2] AND [Q3] AND [Q4] AND [Q5] AND [Q6] AND [Q7] AND [Q8] AND [Q9] in single response

assertions.description: No .sv files generated before user answers questions
assertions.check: no .sv files exist in output_dir before user response
